errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred in this view.

quickClean.title: Quick Clean
quickClean.description: Free up space in one tap

activity.empty: No cleanups yet. Run Quick Clean to start.

cleaner.title: Clean Your PC
cleaner.subtitle: Select what to remove, then tap Scan

temp_files.label: Temporary Files
temp_files.description: Leftover files from apps that no longer need them. Usually the biggest win.

browser_cache.label: Browser Cache
browser_cache.description: Saved pages from Chrome, Edge, Firefox. Your passwords and bookmarks stay.

recycle_bin.label: Recycle Bin
recycle_bin.description: Items waiting to be permanently deleted. Estimated size.

old_logs.label: Old Log Files
old_logs.description: Debug records from apps and Windows. Nobody reads these.

prefetch.label: App Launch Cache
prefetch.description: Windows launch-speed data. Rebuilds itself after a reboot, no harm done.

windows_update_cache.label: Windows Update Cache
windows_update_cache.description: Old update packages. Often a few gigabytes sitting there for no reason.

delivery_optimization.label: Delivery Optimization
delivery_optimization.description: Local cache Windows uses to share updates with other PCs on your network.

windows_error_reports.label: Error Reports
windows_error_reports.description: Crash logs Windows sends to Microsoft. You won't miss them.

thumbnail_cache.label: Thumbnail Cache
thumbnail_cache.description: Image previews from File Explorer. They get rebuilt the next time you browse a folder.

icon_cache.label: Icon Cache
icon_cache.description: Cached program icons. Windows recreates them on next restart.

memory_dumps.label: Memory Dumps
memory_dumps.description: Created after system crashes. Only useful if you're debugging a blue screen.

discord_cache.label: Discord Cache
discord_cache.description: Images, videos and data Discord stored locally. Your messages and settings stay.

spotify_cache.label: Spotify Cache
spotify_cache.description: Offline song data. Songs re-download on next play.

steam_cache.label: Steam Cache
steam_cache.description: Old manifests and logs from Steam updates. Won't affect your games.

recent_files.label: Recent Files List
recent_files.description: History of files and folders you opened recently. Good to clear for privacy.

dns_cache.label: DNS Cache
dns_cache.description: Stored domain lookups. Clearing this can fix weird connectivity issues.

empty.title: Your PC is spotless!
empty.message: Nothing to clean right now. Come back in a few days.

modal.title: Ready to clean?
modal.body: This will permanently delete {{size}} across {{files}} files.

success.title: Done! {{size}} freed
success.subtitle: {{files}} files removed
success.partialNotice: Some items could not be removed, so this was only a partial cleanup.

visualEffects.title: Animations & Transparency
visualEffects.description: Turning off speeds up older PCs

hibernate.title: Hibernate
hibernate.description: Saves RAM to disk on shutdown so you can resume exactly where you left off.

fastStartup.title: Fast Startup
fastStartup.description: Hybrid shutdown that makes boot times faster by partially hibernating the kernel.

gameMode.title: Apply Game Mode Preset
gameMode.description: Sets High Performance power plan and enables Windows Game Mode for maximum FPS.

ultimatePerformance.title: Unlock Ultimate Performance
ultimatePerformance.description: Activates the hidden Ultimate Performance power plan — eliminates micro-latency by preventing the CPU from entering low-power states.

network.title: Disable Network Throttling
network.description: Removes Windows multimedia network throttling — reduces latency for games and real-time apps.

ramOptimizer.title: Free Up RAM
ramOptimizer.description: Clears working sets of background processes to reclaim memory.

gpuHags.title: Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling
gpuHags.description: Lets the GPU manage its own video memory directly, reducing CPU overhead and latency in games.

telemetry.title: Disable Telemetry
telemetry.description: Stops Windows from sending diagnostic and usage data to Microsoft servers.

bingSearch.title: Disable Bing in Start Menu
bingSearch.description: Removes Bing web results from the Start Menu search bar.

advertisingId.title: Disable Advertising ID
advertisingId.description: Prevents apps from using your advertising ID to show personalized ads.

activityHistory.title: Disable Activity History
activityHistory.description: Stops Windows from recording apps and files you open to build a usage timeline.

location.title: Disable Location Access
location.description: Blocks apps from accessing your geographic location by default.

expertWarning.title: These settings affect system behavior
expertWarning.message: Only change if you know what you're doing.

tasksWarning.title: Telemetry scheduled tasks
tasksWarning.message: These background tasks collect usage data for Microsoft. Disabling won't break anything.

toast.visualPerformance: Visual effects set to performance mode

repair.title: Repair Tools
repair.subtitle: Scan and fix Windows system issues
repair.adminWarning: These tools require administrator privileges to run. If the app is not elevated, tools will report an error.

restorePoint.title: Create Restore Point
restorePoint.description: Creates a Windows System Restore snapshot you can revert to if something goes wrong.

sfc.title: SFC /scannow
sfc.description: Scans all protected Windows system files and replaces corrupted versions with a cached copy.

dism.title: DISM /RestoreHealth
dism.description: Repairs the Windows component store used by SFC. Run this first if SFC keeps failing.

toast.sfcFailed: SFC scan failed or requires admin rights
toast.dismFailed: DISM repair failed or requires admin rights

debloater.title: Remove Bloatware
debloater.subtitle: Pre-installed apps you probably don't need

cautionBanner.title: Contains cautionary apps
cautionBanner.message: Some selected apps may affect system features. Review the ⚠ Caution labels above before removing.

modal.cautionWarning: Some apps may affect Windows features when removed.
modal.disclaimer: This cannot be undone without reinstalling from the Microsoft Store.
